name: steam-games-mcp
description: Search Steam games and read store details, prices, reviews and discounts (no key), plus player profiles, libraries and achievements via the Steam Web API.

tools.name: search_games
tools.description: Search the Steam store by title.

tools.name: get_game
tools.description: Game store details (price, genres, Metacritic, …).

tools.name: get_game_reviews
tools.description: Review summary + recent reviews.

tools.name: get_review_histogram
tools.description: Review trend over time (history + recent).

tools.name: get_prices
tools.description: Batch current price/discount for many appids.

tools.name: get_specials
tools.description: Games currently on discount.

tools.name: get_featured
tools.description: Featured store sections (top sellers, new, …).

tools.name: get_game_news
tools.description: Recent news / patch notes for a game.

tools.name: get_global_achievements
tools.description: Global achievement unlock rates.

tools.name: get_items
tools.description: Batch store card (price, review %, release) for many appids.

tools.name: discover_games
tools.description: Find games catalog-wide by discount / recency / Steam Deck / review quality.

tools.name: get_game_achievements
tools.description: Full achievement list w/ names + rarity (key).

tools.name: get_current_players
tools.description: Live concurrent player count.

tools.name: get_wishlist
tools.description: A player's wishlist appids (public profiles).

tools.name: get_followed_games
tools.description: A player's followed games, separate from the wishlist (public profiles).

tools.name: resolve_vanity_url
tools.description: Vanity profile name → SteamID64 (key).

tools.name: get_player_summary
tools.description: Player public profile incl. Steam level (key).

tools.name: get_player_bans
tools.description: VAC/game/community/economy ban status (key).

tools.name: get_owned_games
tools.description: A player's games + playtime (key).

tools.name: get_recently_played
tools.description: Games played in the last 2 weeks (key).

tools.name: get_recommended_games
tools.description: Personalized picks from the player's own tag/playtime taste (key).

tools.name: get_player_achievements
tools.description: A player's achievements in a game (key).

tools.name: get_friend_list
tools.description: A player's friends (key, public friends list).

tools.name: find_friends_who_own
tools.description: Which friends own given appid(s), checking their full library (key).

tools.name: compare_players
tools.description: Games two players both own, with each one's playtime (key).

steam_api_key.title: Steam Web API Key
steam_api_key.description: Optional. Free key from https://steamcommunity.com/dev/apikey — enables player profile, library and achievement tools. Store/search tools work without it.

steam_id.title: Default Steam ID
steam_id.description: Optional. Your 17-digit SteamID64 or vanity name (the part after /id/ in your profile URL). Lets the player tools default to you, so you can ask 'my wishlist' without passing an ID. A vanity name needs the API key to resolve.

steam_country.title: Store country (cc)
steam_country.description: Optional. Two-letter ISO country code for store prices, e.g. 'US', 'GB', 'DE'. Defaults to US.

steam_language.title: Store language
steam_language.description: Optional. Store language, e.g. 'english', 'russian', 'german'. Defaults to english.
